location: Inside a locked cell in Gaol Cave, northwest Caelid; pull the lever that unlocks the cells to access it, alongside a Stonesword Key and a Golden Rune.
tactics: Gaol Cave requires two Stonesword Keys just to get through its sealed Imp Statue entrance — budget for that before heading in.
Inside, find and pull the cell-release lever; the Wakizashi is in one of the now-open cells along with a Stonesword Key and a Golden Rune.
The dungeon also holds the Regalia of Eochaid helm — worth grabbing while you're already inside.
lore: A short, tempered blade carried as a companion piece to a full-length katana by warriors from a land far across the sea — famously wielded alongside its longer partner by the demonic swordsman Bloody Finger Okina.

builds.name: Str/Dex bleed quality
builds.why: Even D/D Strength/Dexterity scaling, high base physical damage, and 38 innate bleed buildup make it a strong quality bleed pick, especially when two-handed for extra damage.

builds.name: Light backup blade
builds.why: Only 3.0 weight for its damage output makes it an efficient secondary weapon for a dex-heavy loadout.
